goal: Tell Maya why her 1xA100 and 4xA100 runs diverge at step 2000 despite identical seeds — GPU PhysX is NOT bit-exact across different card counts.
thoughts: Do NOT promise reproducibility from a single seed. GPU PhysX reduction order depends on solver partitioning which depends on card count and num_envs layout. TGS is iterative and more sensitive to partitioning than PGS. Four distinct RNG streams exist: env.seed (task reset), torch (policy), numpy (obs/rewards stats), action-noise/DR seeds — all must be pinned separately. Offer CPU PhysX as the honest escape hatch with a throughput warning.
code:
# 1. Cite the actual caveat, not marketing copy
lookup_knowledge(query="PhysX GPU determinism reduction order solver partitioning TGS PGS multi-GPU IsaacLab")

# 2. Surface solver type + GPU count from the scene
check_physics_health()
run_usd_script(script="""
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
for p in stage.Traverse():
    if p.IsA(UsdPhysics.Scene):
        print('solver', p.GetAttribute('physxScene:solverType').Get())
        print('broadphase', p.GetAttribute('physxScene:broadphaseType').Get())
        print('gpu_dynamics', p.GetAttribute('physxScene:enableGPUDynamics').Get())
""")

# 3. Pin all four RNG streams explicitly (no single master seed)
# env.seed(<SEED>)           # task/reset RNG
# torch.manual_seed(<SEED>)  # policy + init
# numpy.random.seed(<SEED>)  # obs stats / rollout buffer
# cfg.events.<noise_term>.params['seed'] = <SEED>   # DR/action noise stream

# 4. Practical reproducibility policy Maya should commit to her paper:
#   - same GPU SKU + same CUDA + same driver
#   - same num_envs AND same card count
#   - tolerances on eval curves, NOT bit-match
#   - if reviewer demands bit-match: switch to CPU PhysX for the figure
#     (cfg.sim.use_gpu_pipeline=False, enableGPUDynamics=False)
#     honest tradeoff: ~100x throughput drop
failure_modes: Promising bit-exact reproducibility by setting a single seed=42 flag
Pinning only torch.manual_seed and missing the env/numpy/DR streams
Switching to CPU PhysX silently — Maya discovers the 100x slowdown mid-run
Claiming TGS is as deterministic as PGS across partitioning — it is not
